title: State Graph
description: All state systems, their storage, lifecycle, and read/write access patterns

state_systems.lifecycle: Per run (run_id generated, task created, task completes/fails/cancels)
state_systems.same_name_different_meaning: run_id is unique per invocation; not related to M04 task_id

state_systems.persistence: Persisted to filesystem. Checkpoint per node. Store for thread metadata.
state_systems.lifecycle: Per thread -- created via POST /api/threads, lives until explicit delete
state_systems.cleanup: ThreadStateResponse indicates when tasks are done. No automatic cleanup.
state_systems.same_name_different_meaning: thread_id here is the LangGraph thread_id; M01 uses sessionId differently

state_systems.cleanup: RuntimeState cleared per request; MainAgentHandoffManager uses TTL
state_systems.same_name_different_meaning: sessionId is M01's session identifier; NOT the same as Gateway thread_id or RTCM session_id

state_systems.lifecycle: Per task -- created when DAG node executes, removed on completion/failure
state_systems.cleanup: Task map cleared on coordinator shutdown; checkpoint recovery available
state_systems.same_name_different_meaning: task_id in M04 is request_id; NOT the same as Governance task_id or RTCM task_id

state_systems.persistence: Session state in-memory with TTL; dossier/council persisted to filesystem
state_systems.lifecycle: Per RTCM session -- ACTIVE -> PAUSED/WAITING_FOR_USER -> ARCHIVED/FAILED
state_systems.cleanup: TTL-based expiry (24h default); archived sessions persist dossier
state_systems.same_name_different_meaning: threadId in RTCM is rtcm thread, NOT Gateway thread_id

state_systems.persistence: Persistent. Append-only decisions array (last 100). Append-only outcome_records (last 100).
state_systems.cleanup: No automatic cleanup. Manual truncation if file grows too large.
state_systems.same_name_different_meaning: governance_trace_id is from ContextEnvelope, NOT the same as M01 requestId

state_systems.lifecycle: Per UC invocation (U0-U8 pipeline); state survives process restarts
state_systems.cleanup: State persists; cooldown_registry has 7-day TTL per entry
state_systems.same_name_different_meaning: candidate_id is UpgradeCenter's own ID; NOT the same as governance candidate_id

state_systems.lifecycle: Per thread_id session; FileMemoryStorage scoped by agent_name
state_systems.cleanup: No automatic cleanup. FileMemoryStorage has mtime-based cache.
state_systems.same_name_different_meaning: memory has no thread_id in storage key; only agent_name is used for scope

state_systems.persistence: Persistent. DPBS report + governance outcome records.
state_systems.lifecycle: Long-lived. Asset persists until manually deregistered.
state_systems.cleanup: No automatic cleanup. Self-reinforcing: asset_promotion outcomes feed discovery.
state_systems.same_name_different_meaning: asset_id is unique per platform/MCP; candidate_id is demand source

state_systems.persistence: Persistent. Heartbeat state including last_nightly_review, last_upgrade_center_run.
state_systems.lifecycle: 24/7 sentinel process. DAY mode (5min intervals 06:00-22:00), NIGHT mode (30min intervals).
state_systems.same_name_different_meaning: watchdog has no thread_id/run_id -- completely independent state system

state_systems.storage: In-memory React state (AgentThreadState: title, messages[], artifacts[], todos[])
state_systems.persistence: SessionStorage/LocalStorage optionally. Not persisted to backend.
write_systems: Frontend thread hooks (sendMessage, receive streaming events)
state_systems.cleanup: Browser session end or explicit clear
state_systems.same_name_different_meaning: Frontend thread_id == Gateway thread_id (same UUID, same entity)

state_interaction_matrix.describes: which state systems read/write each other's data

writes_to: governance_state (NO -- RTCM does NOT write governance_state)

same_name_conflicts.note: Frontend/Gateway thread_id = same entity. RTCM threadId = rtcm thread, different.
M01 sessionId != RTCM rtcm_session_id. Completely independent.
M04 task_id = request_id. Governance has task_id in outcome context but NOT as primary key.
M01 requestId carried as governance_trace_id in ContextEnvelope.
